title: Concept Body Sections
description: Markdown body sections expected in every concept file. Not frontmatter — extracted by ingest, never validated by JSON Schema.

## Key Takeaways.description: Bullet list of the most important things to understand about this concept. Append new bullets; never duplicate.

## From sources.description: One entry per source wikilink or URL that contributed to this concept, describing what it added. Append new entries; never duplicate.

## Notes.description: Free-form overflow notes that don't fit a first-class section. Append paragraphs; preserve existing text.
